    A

    AbstractBuilder<T> - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Abstract base class for data generator builders.
    AbstractBuilder(RandomGenerator) - Constructor for class io.bloviate.gen.AbstractBuilder
    Constructs a new AbstractBuilder with the specified random number generator.
    AbstractDatabaseSupport - Class in io.bloviate.ext
    Base DatabaseSupport that maps columns to generators through a JDBCType-keyed registry of GeneratorFactory entries.
    AbstractDatabaseSupport() - Constructor for class io.bloviate.ext.AbstractDatabaseSupport
    Builds the support, seeding the registry with cross-database defaults and then invoking AbstractDatabaseSupport.configure(Map) so subclasses can add or replace entries.
    AbstractDataGenerator<T> - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Abstract base class providing common functionality for data generators.
    AbstractDataGenerator(RandomGenerator) - Constructor for class io.bloviate.gen.AbstractDataGenerator
    Initializes the generator with the given random source and a SeededRandomUtils view over it.
    add(ColumnDefinition) - Method in class io.bloviate.file.FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    Appends a single column definition to the existing list of columns.
    add(T, double) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.WeightedCategoricalGenerator.Builder
    Adds one value with its (positive) weight.
    addAll(List) - Method in class io.bloviate.file.FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    Replaces the column definitions with the supplied list.
    ALGORITHM - Static variable in class io.bloviate.util.RandomGenerators
    The RandomGenerator algorithm used by the fill engine.
    allowedValues() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.ColumnConstraint
    Returns the value of the allowedValues record component.
    appendParameter(String, String, String) - Static method in class io.bloviate.util.JdbcUrls
    Appends name=value to the URL's query string, choosing ? or & as the separator.
    areaCode() - Method in record class io.bloviate.datafaker.Geo
    Returns the value of the areaCode record component.
    at(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.datafaker.RowContext
    Returns the entity for the given absolute row index, computing it at most once per row per thread.
    autoIncrement() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.Column
    Returns the value of the autoIncrement record component.

    B

    BAD_CREDIT - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.CreditGenerator
    The TPC-C bad-credit marker, "BC".
    batches() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.CommitStrategy
    Returns the value of the batches record component.
    batchRewriteUrlParameter() - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.CockroachDBSupport
    CockroachDB ignores the PostgreSQL driver's reWriteBatchedInserts parameter, so there is nothing to recommend; overrides PostgresSupport.batchRewriteUrlParameter() back to null.
    batchRewriteUrlParameter() - Method in interface io.bloviate.ext.DatabaseSupport
    Returns the JDBC-URL parameter name that enables this driver's batch rewrite optimization — collapsing a JDBC batch into a single multi-row INSERT — or null if the database has no such parameter.
    batchRewriteUrlParameter() - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.MySQLSupport
    Returns rewriteBatchedStatements, the MySQL Connector/J parameter that rewrites a batch of single-row INSERTs into one multi-row statement.
    batchRewriteUrlParameter() - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.PostgresSupport
    Returns reWriteBatchedInserts, the PostgreSQL JDBC driver parameter that rewrites a batch of single-row INSERTs into one multi-row statement.
    batchSize() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Returns the value of the batchSize record component.
    batchSize() - Element in annotation interface io.bloviate.junit.FillDatabase
    The JDBC batch size used for INSERTs.
    batchSize(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.testcontainers.BloviateContainers.Builder
    Sets the JDBC batch size for INSERTs.
    beforeEach(ExtensionContext) - Method in class io.bloviate.junit.BloviateExtension
     
    BigDecimalGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates BigDecimal values sized to a column's declared precision and scale using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    BigDecimalGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for BigDecimalGenerator.
    BitGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates a single bit as an Integer that is either 0 or 1, chosen uniformly using the seeded random source (so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence).
    BitGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for BitGenerator.
    BitStringGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates a string of '0' and '1' characters for SQL BIT / VARBIT columns, e.g.
    BitStringGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for BitStringGenerator.
    BloviateContainers - Class in io.bloviate.testcontainers
    Fills a started JdbcDatabaseContainer with Bloviate-generated data — the public form of the pattern Bloviate uses in its own tests.
    BloviateContainers.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.testcontainers
    Configures and runs a fill against a JdbcDatabaseContainer.
    BloviateExtension - Class in io.bloviate.junit
    JUnit Jupiter extension that fills a test database before each test, driven by FillDatabase.
    BloviateExtension() - Constructor for class io.bloviate.junit.BloviateExtension
    Creates the extension; instantiated by JUnit via @ExtendWith.
    BooleanGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generator for Boolean values.
    BooleanGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for creating BooleanGenerator instances.

    build(int) - Static method in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Builds a TPC-C configuration using the default per-warehouse cardinalities.
    build(int, int, int, int, int, int) - Static method in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Builds a TPC-C configuration with explicit cardinalities (useful for tests).
    build(int, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Static method in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Builds a TPC-C configuration with explicit cardinalities, including the number of new_order rows per district.

    Builder(DataSource, DatabaseConfiguration) - Constructor for class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseFiller.Builder
    Creates a builder that fills from a pooled DataSource.
    ByteGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates an array of random Bytes using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    ByteGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for ByteGenerator.

    C

    cardinality(ChildCardinality) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.ChildCountGenerator.Builder
    The ChildCardinality consulted for each parent row: row k emits cardinality.count(k).
    cardinality(ChildCardinality) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    The ChildCardinality that supplies each parent's child count.
    cardinality(ChildCardinality) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder
    Sets the shared per-order line-count cardinality (required).
    catalog() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.Column
    Returns the value of the catalog record component.
    catalog() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.Database
    Returns the value of the catalog record component.
    CharacterGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates a single lowercase ASCII letter ('a' through 'z') chosen uniformly using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    CharacterGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for CharacterGenerator.
    ChildCardinality - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Deterministic mapping from a parent row's global (row-major) index to the number of child rows it owns, drawn from the inclusive range [minChildren, maxChildren].
    ChildCardinality(int, int, long) - Constructor for class io.bloviate.gen.ChildCardinality
    Creates a cardinality over the inclusive range [minChildren, maxChildren].
    ChildCountGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Emits a parent table's "number of children" column under variable parent-child cardinality: for the k-th row (0-based) it returns cardinality.count(k) (for example TPC-C's o_ol_cnt).
    ChildCountGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for ChildCountGenerator.
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Emits one component of a child table's composite key when each parent has a variable number of children (see ChildCardinality), which the fixed-cardinality CompositeKeyComponentGenerator cannot express.
    ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for ChildKeyComponentGenerator.
    CidrGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates IPv4 CIDR network specifications of the form a.b.c.0/24.
    CidrGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for CidrGenerator.
    city() - Method in record class io.bloviate.datafaker.Geo
    Returns the value of the city record component.
    CockroachDBSupport - Class in io.bloviate.ext
    CockroachDB-specific DatabaseSupport.
    CockroachDBSupport() - Constructor for class io.bloviate.ext.CockroachDBSupport
    Creates the CockroachDB support with its default configuration.
    column() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.KeyColumn
    Returns the value of the column record component.
    Column - Record Class in io.bloviate.db
    Represents a database column with its complete metadata.
    Column(String, String, String, String, JDBCType, Integer, Integer, String, Boolean, Boolean, String, Integer) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.Column
    Creates an instance of a Column record class.
    columnConfiguration(String) - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.TableConfiguration
    Retrieves the per-column configuration for the given column name.
    ColumnConfiguration - Record Class in io.bloviate.db
    Overrides the data generator used for a single column, replacing the generator that would otherwise be auto-detected from the column's JDBC type.
    ColumnConfiguration(String, ColumnGeneratorFactory) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.ColumnConfiguration
    Creates an instance of a ColumnConfiguration record class.
    columnConfigurations() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.TableConfiguration
    Returns the value of the columnConfigurations record component.
    ColumnConstraint - Record Class in io.bloviate.db
    A value constraint captured for a column — the machine-readable part of a CHECK constraint or an ENUM/domain's allowed values — so the fill engine can generate values that satisfy it instead of values a constraint would reject (issue #479).
    ColumnConstraint(List, BigDecimal, boolean, BigDecimal, boolean) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.ColumnConstraint
    Creates an instance of a ColumnConstraint record class.
    ColumnDefinition - Record Class in io.bloviate.file
    Defines a column for flat file generation.
    ColumnDefinition(String, DataGenerator) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.file.ColumnDefinition
    Creates an instance of a ColumnDefinition record class.
    ColumnGeneratorFactory - Interface in io.bloviate.db
    Builds the DataGenerator used to override generation for a single column.
    columnName() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.ColumnConfiguration
    Returns the value of the columnName record component.
    columns() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.Table
    Returns the value of the columns record component.
    columnSeed(Column, long) - Static method in class io.bloviate.util.DatabaseUtils
    Computes a stable, reproducible generation seed for a column.
    commitStrategy() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Returns the value of the commitStrategy record component.
    commitStrategy(CommitStrategy) - Method in class io.bloviate.db.TableFiller.Builder
    Overrides the CommitStrategy for this table fill.
    CommitStrategy - Record Class in io.bloviate.db
    How a TableFiller commits the rows it inserts.
    CommitStrategy(CommitStrategy.Mode, int) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.CommitStrategy
    Validates the mode/batches pairing.
    CommitStrategy.Mode - Enum Class in io.bloviate.db
    The available commit modes.
    CompositeKeyComponentGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates one component (dimension) of a row-ordered cartesian product, which is what is needed to populate composite primary/foreign keys densely and without collisions.
    CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.
    configure(Map) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.AbstractDatabaseSupport
    Hook for subclasses to add or replace generator factories for specific JDBC types.
    configure(Map) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.MySQLSupport
     
    configure(Map) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.PostgresSupport
     
    CONNECTION_DEFAULT - Enum constant in enum class io.bloviate.db.CommitStrategy.Mode
    Leave the connection's autocommit state untouched (the default, back-compatible behavior).
    connectionDefault() - Static method in record class io.bloviate.db.CommitStrategy
    The back-compatible default: the engine never changes the connection's autocommit state.
    context(long, Locale) - Static method in class io.bloviate.datafaker.People
    A context of coherent Person identities.
    contribute(GeneratorRegistry.Builder) - Method in class io.bloviate.datafaker.DatafakerGeneratorPlugin
     
    contribute(GeneratorRegistry.Builder) - Method in interface io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorPlugin
    Contributes generator rules to the registry under construction.
    count(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.ChildCardinality
    Returns the deterministic child count for the parent at the given global index.
    country() - Method in record class io.bloviate.datafaker.Geo
    Returns the value of the country record component.
    create(long) - Static method in class io.bloviate.util.RandomGenerators
    Creates a new, independent RandomGenerator seeded with the given value.
    create(Column, RandomGenerator) - Method in interface io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorFactory
    Creates a generator for the given column.
    create(RandomGenerator) - Method in interface io.bloviate.db.ColumnGeneratorFactory
    Creates the generator for the configured column.
    CreditGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Generates the TPC-C customer credit rating (clause 4.3.2.7): "GC" (good credit) 90% of the time and "BC" (bad credit) 10% of the time.
    CreditGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Builds CreditGenerator instances.
    CSV - Enum constant in enum class io.bloviate.file.FileType
    Comma-separated values format.
    CsvFile - Class in io.bloviate.file
    FileDefinition for comma-delimited (CSV) output.
    CsvFile() - Constructor for class io.bloviate.file.CsvFile
    Constructs a new CSV file definition using the FileType.CSV format.
    CurrentSqlTimestampGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates the current timestamp at the moment of generation.
    CurrentSqlTimestampGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for CurrentSqlTimestampGenerator.
    CustomerLastNameGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Generates TPC-C customer last names (clause 4.3.2.3): three concatenated syllables selected from a fixed set by a number in [0, 999].
    CustomerLastNameGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Builds CustomerLastNameGenerator instances.
    cycle(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    For a parent-component generator (i.e. when ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.sequence() is not used), the size (cardinality) of this parent dimension — the cycle term in start + ((parentIndex / repeat) % cycle), which must match the parent's own cycle.
    cycle(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    This dimension's cardinality — how many distinct values it takes before wrapping back to start; the cycle term in start + ((rowIndex / repeat) % cycle).

    D

    Database - Record Class in io.bloviate.db
    Represents a database instance with its metadata and contained tables.
    Database(String, String, String, String, List) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.Database
    Creates an instance of a Database record class.
    DatabaseConfiguration - Record Class in io.bloviate.db
    Configuration settings for database filling operations.
    DatabaseConfiguration(int, long, DatabaseSupport, Set) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Creates a configuration with no custom GeneratorRegistry and a base seed of 0.
    DatabaseConfiguration(int, long, DatabaseSupport, Set, long) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Creates a configuration with the given base seed and no custom GeneratorRegistry.
    DatabaseConfiguration(int, long, DatabaseSupport, Set, long, CommitStrategy) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Creates a configuration with the given base seed and CommitStrategy, and no custom GeneratorRegistry.
    DatabaseConfiguration(int, long, DatabaseSupport, Set, GeneratorRegistry) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Creates a configuration with a custom GeneratorRegistry and a base seed of 0.
    DatabaseConfiguration(int, long, DatabaseSupport, Set, GeneratorRegistry, long) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Creates a configuration with a custom GeneratorRegistry and base seed, and the default CommitStrategy (preserves the original six-argument signature).
    DatabaseConfiguration(int, long, DatabaseSupport, Set, GeneratorRegistry, long, CommitStrategy) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Normalizes a null commitStrategy to CommitStrategy.connectionDefault() so the back-compatible behavior applies whenever a caller does not specify one.
    DatabaseFiller - Class in io.bloviate.db
    Main entry point for filling database tables with generated data.
    DatabaseFiller.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.db
    Builder for constructing DatabaseFiller instances.
    databaseSupport() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Returns the value of the databaseSupport record component.
    databaseSupport(DatabaseSupport) - Method in class io.bloviate.testcontainers.BloviateContainers.Builder
    Overrides the auto-detected DatabaseSupport.
    DatabaseSupport - Interface in io.bloviate.ext
    Database-specific support interface for data generation and SQL handling.
    DatabaseUtils - Class in io.bloviate.util
    Utility class for extracting database metadata through JDBC.
    DataColumnGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Generates the TPC-C i_data / s_data values (clause 4.3.3.1): a random alphabetic string of length 26..50 that, 10% of the time, contains the literal "ORIGINAL" at a random position.
    DataColumnGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Builds DataColumnGenerator instances.
    DatafakerGeneratorPlugin - Class in io.bloviate.datafaker
    A GeneratorPlugin that maps common column names to realistic Datafaker providers, so an email VARCHAR gets a plausible email instead of random text.
    DatafakerGeneratorPlugin() - Constructor for class io.bloviate.datafaker.DatafakerGeneratorPlugin
    Uses Locale.ENGLISH; this is the constructor the ServiceLoader calls.
    DatafakerGeneratorPlugin(Locale) - Constructor for class io.bloviate.datafaker.DatafakerGeneratorPlugin
    Creates a plugin that generates realistic values in the given locale.
    DatafakerStringGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.datafaker
    Produces a realistic String value from a Datafaker provider — an email, a name, a phone number, an address part, and so on.
    DatafakerStringGenerator(RandomGenerator, Locale, Integer, Function) - Constructor for class io.bloviate.datafaker.DatafakerStringGenerator
    Creates a generator that draws realistic values from the given Datafaker provider.
    dataGenerator() - Method in record class io.bloviate.file.ColumnDefinition
    Returns the value of the dataGenerator record component.
    DataGenerator<T> - Interface in io.bloviate.gen
    Core interface for generating test data for database columns.
    DateGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates random Date values drawn uniformly from a millisecond instant in the half-open range [start, end) (start inclusive, end exclusive).
    DateGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for DateGenerator instances.
    DEFAULT_CUSTOMERS_PER_DISTRICT - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Default customers (and orders) per district (C), per the spec.
    DEFAULT_DISTRICTS_PER_WAREHOUSE - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Default districts per warehouse (D), per the spec.
    DEFAULT_ENUMERATED_LAST_NAMES - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Default number of c_last names enumerated deterministically per district.
    DEFAULT_ITEMS - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Default number of items (I), per the spec.
    DEFAULT_MAX_LINES_PER_ORDER - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Default maximum order lines per order (inclusive), per the spec.
    DEFAULT_MIN_LINES_PER_ORDER - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Default minimum order lines per order (inclusive), per the spec.
    DEFAULT_NEW_ORDERS_PER_DISTRICT - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
    Default most-recent (undelivered) orders per district held in new_order, per the spec.
    DEFAULT_REFERENCE - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.AbstractBuilder
    Fixed reference instant used as the deterministic stand-in for "now" when a temporal generator's bounds are left at their defaults.
    defaultRowCount() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.DatabaseConfiguration
    Returns the value of the defaultRowCount record component.
    DefaultSupport - Class in io.bloviate.ext
    Fallback DatabaseSupport for generic or unknown JDBC databases.
    DefaultSupport() - Constructor for class io.bloviate.ext.DefaultSupport
    Creates the fallback support with only the cross-database default generators.
    defaultValue() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.Column
    Returns the value of the defaultValue record component.
    delegate(DataGenerator) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.GroupedPrefixGenerator.Builder
    The wrapped generator that supplies the value for each prefix (non-null) row; it is consulted only on prefix rows, never for the null tail, so a stateless delegate is recommended.
    deliveredThreshold(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.OrderLineDeliveryDateGenerator.Builder
    Orders with o_id <= deliveredThreshold are delivered (timestamp); the rest are undelivered (NULL).
    digits(Integer) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.BigDecimalGenerator.Builder
    Sets the maximum scale: the number of fractional digits to the right of the decimal point.
    discover() - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Discovers and applies every GeneratorPlugin visible to the current thread's context class loader via ServiceLoader.
    Distributions - Class in io.bloviate.db
    Ready-made ColumnGeneratorFactories for non-uniform value distributions, so a column can opt into a distribution without writing a generator factory:
    DoubleGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates double values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    DoubleGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for DoubleGenerator.

    Geo - Record Class in io.bloviate.datafaker
    A real, internally consistent geographic tuple for one row: the city, state (and stateAbbreviation), zip, areaCode, and country all belong together (a real city in its real state with a valid local zip and area code) — not "Springfield, WY 90210".

    GOOD_CREDIT - Static variable in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.CreditGenerator
    The TPC-C good-credit marker, "GC".
    GroupedPermutationGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Emits a deterministic random permutation of [start, start + groupSize) within each consecutive run of groupSize rows, advancing to a fresh permutation for the next group.
    GroupedPermutationGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for GroupedPermutationGenerator.
    GroupedPrefixGenerator<T> - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Populates a column only for the first prefixSize rows of each consecutive group of groupSize rows, emitting null for the remainder.
    GroupedPrefixGenerator.Builder<T> - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for GroupedPrefixGenerator.
    groupSize(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.GroupedPermutationGenerator.Builder
    The size of each permutation group: every consecutive run of this many rows is an independent shuffle (a within-group permutation) of [start, start + groupSize), after which a fresh permutation begins.
    groupSize(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.GroupedPrefixGenerator.Builder
    The size of each consecutive group of rows; the sparse-prefix pattern repeats every groupSize rows.
    groupSize(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.CustomerLastNameGenerator.Builder
    The number of customers per district, used to locate each row's position within its district when CustomerLastNameGenerator.Builder.enumeratedCount(int) is set.

    I

    IndexedDataGenerator - Interface in io.bloviate.gen
    A DataGenerator whose value for a row is a deterministic function of that row's absolute (0-based) index, so it can be positioned to any row without replaying every preceding generate() call.
    InetGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates IPv4 host addresses as a dotted-quad String, e.g.
    InetGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for InetGenerator.
    insertString() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.Table
    Generates an SQL INSERT statement template for this table.
    InstantGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates random Instant values drawn uniformly from a millisecond instant in the half-open range [start, end) (start inclusive, end exclusive).
    InstantGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builder for InstantGenerator instances.
    IntegerArrayGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates a fixed-length Integer[] whose elements are unbounded random int values, bound to JDBC arrays of SQL type INTEGER.
    IntegerArrayGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for IntegerArrayGenerator.
    IntegerGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates int values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.
    IntegerGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for IntegerGenerator.
    IntervalGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates time spans as a String in PostgreSQL interval input form, years-months days hours:minutes:seconds, e.g.
    IntervalGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for IntervalGenerator.

    Returns a random double within the range [startInclusive, endExclusive).
    nextFloat(float, float) - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils
    Returns a random float within the range [startInclusive, endExclusive).
    nextInt(int, int) - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils

    nonUniformRandom(int, int, int, int, SeededRandomUtils) - Static method in class io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCUtils
    The TPC-C non-uniform random function NURand (clause 2.1.6): NURand(A, x, y) = (((random(0, A) | random(x, y)) + C) % (y - x + 1)) + x.
    normal(double, double, double, double) - Static method in class io.bloviate.db.Distributions
    A normal (Gaussian) double distribution clamped to [min, max].
    NormalDoubleGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates double values from a normal (Gaussian) distribution with the configured mean and standard deviation, clamped to the inclusive range [min, max].
    NormalDoubleGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builds a NormalDoubleGenerator, defaulting to a standard normal distribution (mean 0, standard deviation 1) with effectively unbounded min/max.
    normalInt(double, double, int, int) - Static method in class io.bloviate.db.Distributions
    A normal (Gaussian) int distribution, rounded and clamped to [min, max].
    NormalIntegerGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates int values from a normal (Gaussian) distribution with the configured mean and standard deviation, rounded to the nearest integer and clamped to the inclusive range [min, max].
    NormalIntegerGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Builds a NormalIntegerGenerator, defaulting to a standard normal distribution (mean 0, standard deviation 1) spanning the full int range.

    Controls whether decimal digits (0-9) are included in the character set.
    numbers(boolean) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.VariableStringGenerator.Builder
    Controls whether decimal digits (0-9) are included in the character set.

    parameterEquals(String, String, String) - Static method in class io.bloviate.util.JdbcUrls

    People - Class in io.bloviate.datafaker
    Builds a RowContext of coherent Person identities for correlated person columns (issue #473).
    PER_TABLE - Enum constant in enum class io.bloviate.db.CommitStrategy.Mode
    Autocommit off; commit once when the table is fully filled.
    Person - Record Class in io.bloviate.datafaker
    A coherent person identity for one row: the email, username, and fullName are all derived from the same firstName/lastName, so columns that project different fields of the same Person agree (no "jane.doe with email bob@…").
    Person(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for record class io.bloviate.datafaker.Person
    Creates an instance of a Person record class.
    perTable() - Static method in record class io.bloviate.db.CommitStrategy
    Autocommit off, a single commit once the table is fully filled.

    R

    random - Variable in class io.bloviate.gen.AbstractBuilder
    The random number generator used for creating data.
    random - Variable in class io.bloviate.gen.AbstractDataGenerator
    The random source backing all value generation; swapped out by AbstractDataGenerator.reseed(long).
    random() - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils
    Returns the value of the random record component.
    random(int, boolean, boolean) - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils
    Generates a random string of the requested length drawn from a fixed character pool selected by the letters/numbers flags: letters only (A-Za-z), digits only (0-9), or alphanumeric (A-Za-z0-9).
    random(int, int, int, boolean, boolean) - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils
    Generates a random string of the requested length, drawing code points from the [start, end) range and keeping only letters and/or digits as requested.
    randomAlphabetic(int) - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils
    Generates a random string of the given length composed only of ASCII letters (A-Za-z).
    RandomGenerators - Class in io.bloviate.util
    Central factory for the RandomGenerator used throughout the fill engine.
    randomNumeric(int) - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils
    Generates a random string of the given length composed only of ASCII digits (0-9).
    randomNumeric(int, int) - Method in record class io.bloviate.util.SeededRandomUtils
    Generates a random string of ASCII digits (0-9) whose length is chosen randomly from the range [minLengthInclusive, maxLengthExclusive).
    randomUtils - Variable in class io.bloviate.gen.AbstractDataGenerator
    A reusable SeededRandomUtils view over AbstractDataGenerator.random, created once per generator so subclasses don't allocate a fresh wrapper on every generate() call.
    readConstraints(Connection, String, String) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.CockroachDBSupport
    Constraint reading is PostgreSQL-specific (issue #479 first cut); CockroachDB's catalog differs, so it overrides PostgresSupport's reader back to none.
    readConstraints(Connection, String, String) - Method in interface io.bloviate.ext.DatabaseSupport
    Reads the value constraints (CHECK constraints and enum/domain allowed values) for a table's columns, so the fill engine can generate values that satisfy them (issue #479).
    readConstraints(Connection, String, String) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.PostgresSupport
     
    recentTimestamps() - Static method in class io.bloviate.db.Distributions
    Recency-skewed timestamps over the generator's default five-year window.
    recentTimestamps(Instant, Instant, double) - Static method in class io.bloviate.db.Distributions
    Recency-skewed timestamps over [start, end] with the given skew (1.0 = uniform).
    register(GeneratorPlugin) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Applies a GeneratorPlugin immediately, letting it register rules at this point in the builder chain.
    registerColumnNamePattern(String, GeneratorFactory) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Registers a generator for columns whose name matches the given regular expression.
    registerJdbcType(JDBCType, GeneratorFactory) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Registers a generator override for a JDBCType.
    registerTypeName(String, GeneratorFactory) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    Registers a generator for columns whose database-specific type name equals the given value, ignoring case (e.g.
    repeat(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    For a parent-component generator (i.e. when ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder.sequence() is not used), the number of consecutive parents that share this dimension's value — i.e. the product of the sizes of all parent dimensions nested inside this one (mirrors CompositeKeyComponentGenerator, and must match the parent's own repeat).
    repeat(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    How many consecutive rows share this dimension's value before it advances — the repeat term in start + ((rowIndex / repeat) % cycle).
    reseed(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.datafaker.DatafakerStringGenerator
     
    reseed(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.AbstractDataGenerator
    Resets only the random source, replacing AbstractDataGenerator.random (and its AbstractDataGenerator.randomUtils view) with a freshly seeded RandomGenerator.
    reseed(long) - Method in interface io.bloviate.gen.DataGenerator
    Resets this generator's random source to the given seed for reproducible foreign-key wraparound.
    resolve(Column, RandomGenerator) - Method in class io.bloviate.ext.GeneratorRegistry
    Resolves the custom generator for a column, honouring the documented precedence (name pattern > vendor typeName > JDBCType).
    RowContext<E> - Class in io.bloviate.datafaker
    Materializes one coherent entity per row (a Person, a geo tuple, …) and lets several columns project fields out of it, so correlated columns agree — issue #473 "referential realism".
    RowContext(LongFunction) - Constructor for class io.bloviate.datafaker.RowContext
    Creates a context that materializes one entity per row from the given factory.
    rowCount() - Method in record class io.bloviate.db.TableConfiguration
    Returns the value of the rowCount record component.
    RowProjectionGenerator<E> - Class in io.bloviate.datafaker
    Emits one field of a RowContext's per-row entity.
    rowRange(long, long) - Method in class io.bloviate.db.TableFiller.Builder
    Restricts this filler to a contiguous sub-range of the table's rows — one partition of an intra-table parallel fill.
    rows() - Element in annotation interface io.bloviate.junit.FillDatabase
    The number of rows to generate per table.
    rows(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.file.FlatFileGenerator.Builder
    Sets the number of data rows to generate, excluding the header row.
    rows(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.testcontainers.BloviateContainers.Builder
    Sets the default number of rows to generate per table.

    scale(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.Builder

    Fluent builder for ScaledBigDecimalGenerator.

    seek(long) - Method in class io.bloviate.datafaker.RowProjectionGenerator
    Positions this projection's row counter at the given row index, so the next RowProjectionGenerator.generate() projects that row's entity.

    Returns the value of the sequence record component.
    sequence() - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.ChildKeyComponentGenerator.Builder
    Switches this generator into sequence mode: it emits the child's 1-based sequence number within its parent (start + positionWithinParent, so start = 1 yields 1, 2, 3, ...).
    SequentialIntegerGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates a monotonically increasing sequence of integers over the inclusive range [startInclusive, endInclusive], wrapping back to the start after the end is emitted.
    SequentialIntegerGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for SequentialIntegerGenerator.

    ShortGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates short values drawn uniformly from the half-open range [startInclusive, endExclusive) using the seeded random source, so a given seed yields a reproducible sequence.

    SqlTimestampGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen

    start(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.CompositeKeyComponentGenerator.Builder

    start(int) - Method in class io.bloviate.gen.GroupedPermutationGenerator.Builder

    Sets the inclusive lower bound of the generated range.

    Z

    zip() - Method in record class io.bloviate.datafaker.Geo
    Returns the value of the zip record component.
    ZipCodeGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Generates TPC-C zip codes (clause 4.3.2.7): four random digits followed by the constant suffix "11111", producing a 9-character value.
    ZipCodeGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen.tpcc
    Builds ZipCodeGenerator instances.
    zipfian(int) - Static method in class io.bloviate.db.Distributions
    A Zipfian (power-law) distribution over [1, size] with the classic exponent 1.0.
    zipfian(int, int, double) - Static method in class io.bloviate.db.Distributions
    A Zipfian (power-law) distribution over [start, start + size) with the given exponent.
    ZipfianIntegerGenerator - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Generates integers from a Zipfian (power-law) distribution over size consecutive values starting at start: rank k (1-based) has probability proportional to 1 / k^exponent, so the lowest values are by far the most frequent and the tail is long and thin.
    ZipfianIntegerGenerator.Builder - Class in io.bloviate.gen
    Fluent builder for ZipfianIntegerGenerator.
